description: Restore the water cycle in the GCompris 'Water Cycle' science simulation by activating the Sun, Cloud, Water Tower, and Water Treatment Plant. Once the system is fully active, save a screenshot to '~/Documents/active_cycle.png' and create a text file at '~/Documents/water_cycle_status.txt' with the content: 'Simulation verified: Water cycle is active.'

metadata.expected_text_content: Simulation verified: Water cycle is active.
